modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to import student data into CollegiateLink

full_description_text: 
User wants to import student data. They are using Cognos and SAS. The data needs to go to CollegiateLink. There was a problem with the import request.

description: User wants to import student data. They are using Cognos and SAS. The data needs to go to CollegiateLink. There was a problem with the import request.
